hero.headline: One address endpoint for every checkout flow.
hero.subheadline: Autocomplete, validate, and enrich addresses through one typed API built for teams that ship.

demo.heading: Type an address. Watch it resolve.

pricing.title: Usage-based. No seats.
pricing.intro: Free gets you building immediately. PAYG billing is managed through Prontiq account surfaces backed by Lago.

freeTier.name: Free
freeTier.description: Build against the live address product before you ever talk to sales.

paygTier.name: PAYG
paygTier.description: Move from Free to usage-based billing when your integration is ready for production traffic.
features: Invoices and payment methods in account billing
Same API keys and request-time limits

pricing.paidPlansFootnote: Stripe is the payment rail behind Lago. Prontiq account billing is the customer-facing surface.

featuresIntro: Fast autocomplete, validation, enrichment, and reverse geocoding.
